Class RatingDaoImpl

java.lang.Object
com.aptcoursework.dao.RatingDaoImpl
All Implemented Interfaces:
RatingDao
public class RatingDaoImpl extends Object implements RatingDao
Implementation class for the RatingDao interface.

This class provides concrete database operations related to the Rating entity, including adding, retrieving, updating, and deleting ratings. It interacts directly with the database using JDBC and the DatabaseConnection utility class.

The class handles operations such as:

  • Adding a new rating
  • Fetching ratings by user or laptop
  • Calculating average ratings
  • Counting ratings by star value
  • Deleting ratings based on user or laptop

All database connections are managed manually and closed in a finally block to ensure proper resource management.

Author:
Heaven Gurung, Sugam Rana Magar

  • Constructor Details

    • RatingDaoImpl

      public RatingDaoImpl()

  • Method Details

    • updateRatingReviewByLaptopUser

      public Boolean updateRatingReviewByLaptopUser(int userID, int laptopID, int rating, String review)
      Specified by:
      updateRatingReviewByLaptopUser in interface RatingDao

    • getRatingByUserID

      public Rating getRatingByUserID(int userID, int laptopID)
      Retrieves a specific rating given by a user for a particular laptop.

      This method queries the database to find a rating entry based on the provided user ID and laptop ID. If a matching record is found, it returns a Rating object populated with rating details including user information. If no record is found or an exception occurs, it returns null.

      Specified by:
      getRatingByUserID in interface RatingDao
      Parameters:
      userID - the unique ID of the user who gave the rating
      laptopID - the unique ID of the laptop being rated
      Returns:
      a Rating object containing rating details if found; otherwise, null
      Throws:
      Exception - no exception is thrown directly, but SQL exceptions are caught and logged internally

    • deleteRatingByLaptopID

      public Boolean deleteRatingByLaptopID(int laptopID)
      Deletes all ratings associated with a specific laptop ID.

      This method executes a SQL DELETE statement to remove all records from the rating table that match the given laptopID.

      If the operation is successful, the method returns true. If an SQL exception occurs during execution, the method logs the error message and returns false.

      Specified by:
      deleteRatingByLaptopID in interface RatingDao
      Parameters:
      laptopID - the unique identifier of the laptop whose ratings are to be deleted
      Returns:
      true if the ratings were successfully deleted; false if an error occurs

    • deleteRatingByUserID

      public Boolean deleteRatingByUserID(int userID, int laptopID)
      Deletes a specific rating given by a user for a particular laptop.

      This method executes a SQL DELETE query to remove a rating record from the rating table based on the provided userID and laptopID.

      If the deletion is successful, the method returns true. If an SQL exception occurs during execution, the error is logged and the method returns false.

      Specified by:
      deleteRatingByUserID in interface RatingDao
      Parameters:
      userID - the unique identifier of the user whose rating is to be deleted
      laptopID - the unique identifier of the laptop for which the rating was given
      Returns:
      true if the rating was successfully deleted; false if an error occurs

    • getAvgRatingbyLaptop

      public double getAvgRatingbyLaptop(int laptopID)
      Calculates the average rating for a specific laptop.

      This method executes a SQL query using the AVG() aggregate function to compute the average rating of all entries in the rating table for the given laptopID.

      If ratings exist, the calculated average is returned. If no ratings are found or an SQL exception occurs, the method returns 0.0.

      Specified by:
      getAvgRatingbyLaptop in interface RatingDao
      Parameters:
      laptopID - the unique identifier of the laptop
      Returns:
      the average rating of the laptop as a double; returns 0.0 if no ratings exist or an error occurs

    • getTotalRatingbyStars

      public int getTotalRatingbyStars(int laptopID, int rating)
      Counts the total number of ratings for a specific laptop with a given star value.

      This method executes a SQL query using the COUNT(*) aggregate function to determine how many times a particular rating (e.g., 1–5 stars) has been assigned to the specified laptopID.

      If matching records are found, the total count is returned. If no records exist or an SQL exception occurs, the method returns 0.

      Specified by:
      getTotalRatingbyStars in interface RatingDao
      Parameters:
      laptopID - the unique identifier of the laptop
      rating - the star rating value to count (e.g., 1 to 5)
      Returns:
      the total number of ratings matching the given criteria; returns 0 if none are found or an error occurs

    • getRatingsByLaptop

      public ArrayList<Rating> getRatingsByLaptop(int laptopID)
      Retrieves all ratings associated with a specific laptop.

      This method executes a SQL query to fetch all rating records for the given laptopID. It performs a LEFT JOIN with the users table to include the username of each user who submitted a rating.

      Each record is mapped to a Rating object and added to an ArrayList. If records are found, the list of ratings is returned. If no records exist, an empty list is returned. If an SQL exception occurs, the method returns null.

      Specified by:
      getRatingsByLaptop in interface RatingDao
      Parameters:
      laptopID - the unique identifier of the laptop
      Returns:
      an ArrayList of Rating objects containing all ratings for the specified laptop; returns null if an error occurs

    • addRating

      public Boolean addRating(Rating rating)
      Adds a new rating record to the database.

      This method inserts a new entry into the rating table using the details provided in the Rating object, including user ID, laptop ID, rating value, and review text.

      If the insertion is successful, the method returns true. If an SQL exception occurs during execution, the error is logged and the method returns false.

      Specified by:
      addRating in interface RatingDao
      Parameters:
      rating - the Rating object containing the rating details to be added
      Returns:
      true if the rating is successfully added; false if an error occurs
